headline: Shares of software companies are trading lower amid overall market weakness as investors rotate out of the industry amid AI disruption concerns. Recent payroll economic data may impact future rate cuts as investors await Friday's CPI results.
summary: Shares of software companies are trading lower amid overall market weakness as investors rotate out of the industry amid AI disruption concerns. Recent payroll economic data may impact future rate cuts as investors await Friday's CPI results.
